overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, starting near a massive green holographic samurai advertisement, turning corners past graffiti-covered walls, and proceeding toward commercial districts with towering neon billboards and holographic displays. The scene features wet reflective streets, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: turning left at corner with large graffiti-covered wall
passing the green holographic samurai, entering the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down a neon-lit street toward a large green holographic samurai sign, then turning left at the corner

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead in the same direction
red car with headlights on driving past the intersection

entered.detail: large green neon hologram of a samurai wielding a sword suspended between buildings
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated windows and vertical neon strips
large digital advertisement screen displaying brand name
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti art of a tiger and Asian characters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive green holographic samurai dominating the street ahead. The camera walks forward through wet asphalt streets lined with towering cyberpunk architecture, then turns left at a corner featuring a prominent graffiti wall with a tiger design and red paper lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along busy commercial street with large corporate signage

events.description: multiple cars including a green sports car passing by on the street to the right
approaching the large teal softsys building entrance with increasing detail

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk toward the illuminated softsys building, passing by street vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing near railing looking at the street traffic
green sports car driving down the wet street with headlights reflecting on pavement

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent teal illuminated softsys signage on facade
red illuminated rectangular sign with white text mounted on building corner
metal rack displaying magazines or items for sale on the sidewalk
tall vertical digital advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk toward the towering softsys building with its distinctive teal signage. The street features moderate traffic with cars passing by, street vendors, and various neon advertisements including a red Capitola sign. The pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon of corporate billboards and advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the towering building facades and billboards above
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking forward

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering building facades covered in digital billboards, then continuing forward

entered.detail: multiple large digital screens stacked vertically on building upper floors showing various advertisements
visible dark night sky visible in the narrow gap between towering skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the vertical canyon of skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards and advertisements. The perspective emphasizes the height of the cyberpunk architecture against the dark night sky visible between buildings, before returning to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with neon art installations and storefronts

events.description: entering open plaza area from narrow street with wider pedestrian space
approaching blue neon pillar installation in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past various storefronts and neon installations, heading toward the blue-lit structure ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking across the plaza in the distance near the storefronts

entered.detail: tall vertical blue neon light installation with multiple glowing pillars in plaza center
storefronts with large digital displays including nicola advertisement and colorful signage
elevated pedestrian walkway connecting buildings across the plaza
silhouetted palm trees visible against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza with tiled flooring and prominent blue neon pillar installations. Storefronts with bright digital displays line the left side while an elevated walkway spans the plaza ahead. The environment feels more open than the previous narrow streets, with scattered pedestrians and palm trees visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, luminous pedestrian plaza. It begins by moving toward a massive green holographic samurai on wet asphalt streets before turning left past a graffiti-covered wall adorned with a tiger design and red lanterns. As the camera proceeds along a reflective concrete sidewalk, the environment shifts toward a commercial hub featuring the teal signage of the Softsys building and various neon advertisements. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a vertical canyon of skyscrapers and massive digital billboards against the dark night sky before returning to street level. Finally, the narrow streets expand into a spacious tiled plaza characterized by blue neon pillars, bright storefronts, and an elevated walkway stretching toward distant palm trees.
